title: Geolocator Data Package
description: Data exchange format for geolocator data.

id.title: ID
id.description: A globally unique identifier for the package. Use the full [version DOI](https://support.zenodo.org/help/en-gb/1-upload-deposit/97-what-is-doi-versioning) URL (`https://doi.org/...`) of the Zenodo record for reproducibility. If a concept DOI is used, metadata should be resolved from the latest available version. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-package/#id).

$schema.title: Profile
$schema.description: URL of the GeoLocator DP profile providing the version information. Use a short Git ref in the URL path. URLs using `refs/tags` are also accepted. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-package/#dollar-schema).

resources.title: Data Resources
resources.description: GeoLocator DP supports tabular resources with a fixed table schema (`tags`, `observations`, `measurements`, `staps`, `twilights`, `paths`, `edges`, `pressurepaths`), a `params` JSON resource, and additional custom resources with non-reserved names. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-resource/).

name.description: Identifier of the resource. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-resource/#name).

type.description: Type of the resource. Only `table` is allowed. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-resource/#type).

path.description: Path or URL to a CSV resource file (`.csv`) or a zipped CSV file (`.csv.gz`, `.csv.zip`, `.zip`). See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-resource/#path).

$schema.description: URL of the used GeoLocator DP Table Schema version. See [Data Package specification](https://datapackage.org/standard/data-resource/#dollar-schema).

name.description: GeoPressureR parameters resource. This JSON file stores the parameters used to build trajectories in the GeoPressureR workflow (the `param` object, organized as `param$<function_name>$<argument_name>`).

path.description: Path or URL to a JSON file containing GeoPressureR parameters (typically `params.json`).

name.description: Identifier of a custom resource. Must not reuse reserved GeoLocator DP resource names.

path.description: Path or URL to the custom resource file.
